column1: # Ascend 910B3 sustained bandwidth seeds (FORMAT TEMPLATE — ALL VALUES ARE SEEDS)
#   L0A — Left matrix input register file (A matrix)
#   L0B — Right matrix input register file (B matrix)
# PROVENANCE WARNING: All values are scaled from 910B1 measurements.
# 910B3 ≠ 910B1 — every P0 path MUST be re-measured via CCE DMA sweep
# microbench on real 910B3 hardware before any I_c enters the bound.
